summary:
Step 6 'Expected Total PRs to be at least 1.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

The developer profile page for @timer did not display populated statistics or a Score History chart after review activity — empty-state placeholders are shown instead of real numbers or chart data points.

Observations:
- The profile header and avatar are visible, showing username '@timer'.
- The stat cards show "Total PRs Reviewed" = 0 and other cards (Average Score, Approve Rate, Most Recent Review) display dashes ("—").
- The Score History section contains the message: "No data yet — analyze a PR by @timer to populate this chart." The page also shows: "No reviews found for @timer".
